measures.name: INVOICEDGSV
measures.description: This measure calculates the total invoiced amount in the master currency, considering the relationship between the delivery date of the invoice and the dates in the 'DATE' table.

measures.name: OPENORDERSGSV
measures.description: Calculates the total sales line amount where the sales status label equals a specific string literal.

measures.name: FOGSV
measures.description: Calculates the total revenue from the 'FORWARDORDERS' table.

measures.name: FORECASTGSV
measures.description: Calculates the sum of the Gross Sales Value (GSV) from the PLAN table, filtered by specific MAINACCOUNTID and MODELID values.

measures.name: INVOICED_PE
measures.description: This measure calculates the sum of invoiced sales and open sales orders up to the end of a specified period.

measures.name: ESTIMATE SALES
measures.description: This measure calculates the estimated sales by adding the forecasted sales, invoiced sales, and open sales for a given period.

measures.name: INVOICED+OPEN+FO
measures.description: This measure calculates the sum of invoiced sales, open sales, and forward sales, where the date is greater than the current day.

measures.name: INVOICEQTY
measures.description: Calculates the total invoice quantity for each product, considering only transactions where the sales unit is a specific string literal and using a relationship between delivery date and dates.

measures.name: INVOICEDUNITS
measures.description: Calculates the total invoiced units by multiplying the invoice quantity with the carton measure for each product, considering only transactions where the sales unit is a specific string literal and using a relationship between delivery date and dates.

measures.name: SELLTHROUGH_FORECASTQTY
measures.description: The `SELLTHROUGH_FORECASTQTY` measure sums up the `PLAN[QUANTITY]` for records where `MAINACCOUNTID` is "40100" and `MODELID` is "FORECAST," using an alternate relationship between `PLAN[DATE]` and `'DATE'[DATES]` for the calculation.

measures.name: SELECTEDFORECAST
measures.description: This measure returns different forecast values (Gross Sales Value, Quantity, Units, or 28% of Gross Sales Value) based on the selected measure name from the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table, with a default return of the Gross Sales Value forecast.

measures.name: INVOICEDQTY_PE
measures.description: This measure calculates the sum of invoiced quantities and open sales orders quantities up to the end of a specified period.

measures.name: OPENORDERSQTY
measures.description: Calculates the total quantity of sales orders that are currently open, as indicated by the sales status label.

measures.name: SELECTEDESTIMATE
measures.description: This measure returns different sales estimates based on the selected value from the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table, including estimated sales, estimated sales units, and estimated sales multiplied by the margin value.

measures.name: SELECTEDINVOICE_PE
measures.description: This measure returns different invoice-related measures such as invoiced quantity, invoiced units, and invoiced value multiplied by margin value, based on the selected measure name from the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table.

measures.name: INVOICED+OPEN+FO QTY
measures.description: This measure calculates the sum of invoiced quantity, open sales orders quantity, and forward orders quantity for dates beyond the current day.

measures.name: SELECTEDINVOICED+OPEN+FO
measures.description: This measure returns the value of either the INVOICED+OPEN+FO, INVOICED+OPEN+FO QTY, or INVOICED+OPEN+FO UNITS measure, depending on the selected value in the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table.

measures.name: FORECASTUNITS
measures.description: Calculates the total units in the plan where the main account ID and model ID match specific string literals.

measures.name: INVOICEDSALES PY
measures.description: Calculates the invoiced sales for the previous fiscal year.

measures.name: INVOICEDQTY PY
measures.description: Calculates the invoiced quantity for the previous fiscal year.

measures.name: SELECTEDPY
measures.description: This measure allows the user to select and return one of four previous year measures: estimated sales, invoiced quantity, estimated sales units, or invoiced sales, based on a selected value from the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table.

measures.name: ESTIMATESALESUNITS
measures.description: This measure calculates the estimated sales units by adding the forecasted units for dates beyond the period end, the invoiced units up to the period end, and the units from open orders up to the period end.

measures.name: FOUNITS
measures.description: Calculates the total units by summing up the units from forward orders, invoiced units, and open order units.

measures.name: INVOICEDUNITS PY
measures.description: This measure calculates the invoiced units for the previous fiscal year.

measures.name: OPENORDERSUNITS
measures.description: Calculates the total open order units by summing the product of open order quantity and carton measure for sales units equal to a specific string literal, and adding it to the sum of open order quantity for sales units equal to the same string literal.

measures.name: ESTIMATESALES PY
measures.description: Calculates the estimated sales for the previous fiscal year.

measures.name: PRICE
measures.description: Calculates the price per unit by dividing the estimated sales by the estimated sales units, returning a blank value if the denominator is zero.

measures.name: PRICE PY
measures.description: Calculates the price per unit for the previous year by dividing the estimated sales of the previous year by the estimated sales units of the previous year.

measures.name: PRICEVARIANCE
measures.description: Calculates the total price variance by multiplying the difference between the current price and the previous year's price by the estimated sales units for each product.

measures.name: VOLUME VARIANCE
measures.description: Calculates the variance in volume by comparing the estimated sales units of the current period with the estimated sales units of the previous year, multiplied by the previous year's price, if the invoiced units of the previous year and the estimated sales units are not zero.

measures.name: ESTIMATESALESUNITS PY
measures.description: Calculates the estimated sales units for the previous fiscal year.

measures.name: BIAS
measures.description: Calculates the bias by dividing the difference between invoiced units and forecasted units by the forecasted units, returning a blank value if the forecasted units are zero.

measures.name: INVOICED+OPEN+FO UNITS
measures.description: This measure calculates the sum of invoiced units, open sales units, and forward orders units, with the date filters applied to the current week and the day after today.

measures.name: INVOICEDUNITS_PE
measures.description: This measure calculates the sum of invoiced units and open sales orders units up to the end of a specified period, using the delivery date for invoiced units and the start of the week for open sales orders.

measures.name: GROWTH
measures.description: Calculates the growth rate by dividing the difference between the current invoiced gross sales value and the previous year's invoiced sales by the previous year's invoiced sales.

measures.name: TotalAbsDifferenceByProduct
measures.description: Calculates the total absolute difference between forecasted units and invoiced units for each selected product.

measures.name: TotalDemandByProduct
measures.description: Calculates the total demand for each product by summing up the invoiced units for all selected product items.

measures.name: WMAPEbyProduct
measures.description: Calculates the Weighted Mean Absolute Percentage Error (WMAPE) for each product, which is a measure of forecast accuracy that takes into account the absolute difference between actual and forecasted demand.

measures.name: CUMULATIVEREVENUE
measures.description: This measure calculates the cumulative revenue from invoiced goods or services, considering all selected products and ordering them by the number of units sold in descending order.

measures.name: CUMULATIVE %
measures.description: Calculates the cumulative percentage by dividing the cumulative revenue by the invoiced gross service value (GSV) across all selected items.

measures.name: WMAPEbyProduct average per Dates
measures.description: Calculates the average Weighted Mean Absolute Percentage Error (WMAPE) by product for each fiscal period, while maintaining any existing filters on the 'DATE' table.

measures.name: SELECTEDSCENARIO
measures.description: This measure, SELECTEDSCENARIO, uses a switch statement to return different results based on the selected value from the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table. It can return the SCENARIO measure, the sum of PLAN units for specific account and model IDs, or 28% of the SCENARIO measure.

measures.name: SCENARIO
measures.description: Calculates the sum of the Gross Sales Value (GSV) from the PLAN table, specifically for entries where the MAINACCOUNTID in the P_L_ACCOUNTS table matches a specific string literal and the MODELID in the PLAN table also matches a specific string literal.

measures.name: OPPORTUNITYGSV
measures.description: Calculates the sum of the 'OPPORTUNITY' value for dates greater than the maximum 'PERIODENDDATE'.

measures.name: OPPORTUNITYUNITS
measures.description: Calculates the total number of opportunity units after a specified period end date.

measures.name: OPPORTUNITYCM
measures.description: Calculates the opportunity cost for the current month by multiplying the opportunity gross sales value with the margin value.

measures.name: BUDGETGSV
measures.description: Calculates the sum of the Gross Sales Value (GSV) from the PLAN table for dates after the maximum period end date, where the model ID matches a specific string literal.

measures.name: SELECTEDBUDGET
measures.description: This measure returns different budget values based on the selected measure name. It uses a switch statement to determine which budget value to return, with options including BUDGET25GSV, BUDGET25UNITS, and 28% of BUDGET25GSV.

measures.name: BUDGETUNITS
measures.description: Calculates the sum of units from the PLAN table where the MAINACCOUNTID in the P_L_ACCOUNTS table equals a specific string literal and the MODELID in the PLAN table also equals a specific string literal.

measures.name: FORECAST_PERIODEND
measures.description: Calculates the sum of the 'GSV' column from the 'PLAN' table for accounts with a specific 'MAINACCOUNTID', but only for dates that are later than the maximum 'PERIODENDDATES' from the 'PERIODENDDATE' table.

measures.name: FORECASTUNITS_PERIODEND
measures.description: Calculates the sum of units in the plan for accounts with a specific main account ID, but only for dates after the maximum period end date.

measures.name: FORECASTCM_PERIODEND
measures.description: This measure calculates the product of the forecast at the end of the period and the margin value, but only for dates that are greater than the maximum period end date.

measures.name: SELECTEDOPPORTUNITY_PE
measures.description: This measure returns the value of either the OpportunityGSV, OpportunityUnits, or OpportunityCM measure, depending on the selected value in the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table, with OpportunityGSV as the default.

measures.name: SELECTEDFORECAST_PE
measures.description: This measure returns the value of one of three forecast measures (FORECAST_PERIODEND, FORECASTUNITS_PERIODEND, FORECASTCM_PERIODEND) based on the selected value in the 'MEASURES SELECTION' table, defaulting to FORECAST_PERIODEND if no selection is made.

measures.name: SELECTEDESTIMATE_PE
measures.description: This measure returns different sums based on the selected value in 'MEASURES SELECTION'[MEASURENAME]. If 'STRING LITERAL' is selected, it returns the sum of invoiced, forecasted, and opportunity GSV. If another 'STRING LITERAL' is selected, it returns the sum of invoiced units, forecasted units, and opportunity units. If a third 'STRING LITERAL' is selected, it returns the sum of invoiced PE multiplied by margin value, forecasted CM at period end, and opportunity CM. If no selection is made, it defaults to the sum of invoiced, forecasted, and opportunity GSV.

measures.name: BLANK
measures.description: A measure that returns a blank value.

measures.name: CARTONMEASURE
measures.description: This measure calculates the maximum carton count from the 'PRODUCTS' table.

measures.name: LASTINVOICEDATETIME
measures.description: This measure calculates the maximum date and time of the last processed change in customer invoices, then adds 10 hours to it.

measures.name: LASTOPENORDERDATETIME
measures.description: Calculates the latest open order date and time by adding 10 hours to the maximum last processed change date and time from the SalesTable, where the sales status label is a specific string literal.

measures.name: FOQTY
measures.description: Calculates the total quantity of forward orders.

measures.name: TODAY
measures.description: Local date and time now

measures.name: SELLTHU_FORECASTUNITS
measures.description: The `SELLTHROUGH_FORECASTQTY` measure calculates the total forecasted quantity from the `PLAN[QUANTITY]` column, filtered to include only entries where `MAINACCOUNTID` is "40100" and `MODELID` is "FORECAST." It also uses an alternate date relationship between `PLAN[DATE]` and `'DATE'[DATES]` for this calculation.

measures.name: DCINVENTORYUNITS
measures.description: Customer DC SOH in eaches (units)

measures.name: DCSOH
measures.description: Customer DC stock on hand in cartons

measures.name: SCANUNITS
measures.description: Scanned unit sales

measures.name: MEASURECOUNT
measures.description: The `MEASURECOUNT` measure calculates the number of distinct values in the `MEASURE_NAME` column from the `MODELSUMMARY` table.

measures.name: ESTIMATE+OPPORTUNITY
measures.description:
The `ESTIMATE+OPPORTUNITY` measure combines forecasted, invoiced, and opportunity values within specific date ranges:

1. **PERIODEND**: Determines the latest date in the `PERIODENDDATE[PERIODENDDATES]` column.
2. **FORECAST2**: Calculates the forecast (`[SELECTEDFORECAST_PE]`) for dates after `PERIODEND`.
3. **INVOICED**: Calculates the invoiced amount (`[SELECTEDINVOICE_PE]`) for dates on or before `PERIODEND`.
4. **RETURN**: Sums `FORECAST2`, `INVOICED`, and `[SELECTEDOPPORTUNITY_PE]` to provide the combined estimate and opportunity value.

measures.name: SCENARIODELTA
measures.description: The measure SCENARIODELTA is designed to calculate the difference between two selected values: [SELECTEDSCENARIO] and [SELECTEDFORECAST]. Specifically, it checks if the difference between these two values is zero. If the difference is zero, the measure returns a blank value (BLANK()). Otherwise, it returns the calculated difference between [SELECTEDSCENARIO] and [SELECTEDFORECAST].

measures.name: LASTSCANDATE
measures.description: The `LASTSCANDATE` measure finds the latest date in the `SCAN[Date]` column, adds 10 hours to it, and then formats this adjusted date and time as "dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm:ss AM/PM".

measures.name: DCDAYS
measures.description: The `DCDAYS` measure calculates the average value of the `DCDAYSCOVER` column from the `DCDAYCOVER` table.

measures.name: CTN_UOM
measures.description: The `CTN_UOM` measure returns the maximum value from the `PRODUCTS[Ctn]` column, representing the largest carton unit of measure for the products.

measures.name: SCANQTY
measures.description: The `SCANQTY` measure calculates the total scanned quantity by iterating over each product in the `PRODUCTS` table. For each product, it divides the number of scanned units (`[SCANUNITS]`) by the units of measure per carton (`[CTN_UOM]`) and then sums up these values.

measures.name: FORECASTQTY
measures.description: The `FORECASTQTY` measure calculates the total forecasted quantity by summing up the `PLAN[QUANTITY]` column, filtered to include only records where `MAINACCOUNTID` is "40100" and `MODELID` is "FORECAST".

measures.name: COLESFORECAST
measures.description: The `COLESFORECAST` measure calculates the total forecasted units by summing up the values in the `COLESFORECAST[TOTALUNITS]` column.

measures.name: WWFORECAST
measures.description: The `WWFORECAST` measure calculates the total baseline units by summing up the values in the `WWFORECAST[BASELINEUNITS]` column.
